name: Mother's Day Cheese Danish Notes
author: Drake's Food
notes: A Mother's Day tea party brunch bake based on Sugar Spun Run's cheese danish recipe, with a quick blackberry jam mixed into half of the cream cheese filling.
ingredients: Cream cheese filling from the linked base recipe
Quick blackberry jam, mixed into half of the filling
instructions: Use the linked Sugar Spun Run cheese danish recipe as the base.
Prepare a quick blackberry jam if adding the fruit variation.
Mix blackberry jam into half of the cream cheese filling.
Assemble and bake the danishes according to the base recipe.
Add post-bake finishing touches as needed. Delicate hands optional.
